title: salvia obovata
intro: Salvia obovata is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family, commonly known as sage, and is native to the mountainous regions of Tibet and Nepal. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as their ability to aid in digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Salvia obovata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and providing relief from symptoms associated with menopause and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Salvia obovata include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed as a supplement to support overall well-being.
